papers.title: JailNewsBench: Multi-Lingual and Regional Benchmark for Fake News Generation under Jailbreak Attacks
papers.tldr_zh: JailNewsBench是首个跨34个地区、22种语言评估LLM抵御越狱诱导假新闻生成能力的基准测试。

papers.title: CyberLLMInstruct: A Pseudo-Malicious Dataset Revealing Safety-Performance Trade-offs in Cyber Security LLM Fine-tuning
papers.tldr_zh: CyberLLMInstruct构建了含54,928条伪恶意指令对的数据集，揭示了网络安全LLM微调中安全性与性能之间的严峻权衡。

papers.title: Fun-tuning: Characterizing the Vulnerability of Proprietary LLMs to Optimization-Based Prompt Injection Attacks via the Fine-Tuning Interface
papers.tldr_zh: Fun-tuning利用闭源LLM微调API返回的类损失信号，对Gemini系列模型实施基于优化的提示注入攻击，成功率达65%至82%。
papers.venue: IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy

papers.title: Towards Real-Time Defense against Object-Based LiDAR Attacks in Autonomous Driving
papers.tldr_zh: 本文提出首个针对自动驾驶激光雷达感知系统中物体对抗攻击的实时防御机制。

papers.title: Probing Vulnerabilities of Vision-Lidar Based Autonomous Driving Systems
papers.tldr_zh: 本文系统评估了主流鸟瞰图（BEV）自动驾驶感知模型在摄像头与激光雷达模态下的对抗攻击脆弱性，并测试了黑盒场景下的攻击迁移性。

papers.title: A New Adversarial Perspective for LiDAR-based 3D Object Detection
papers.tldr_zh: 本文提出ROLiD数据集与PCS-GAN框架，利用水雾和烟雾模拟环境干扰，对自动驾驶LiDAR三维目标检测发起对抗攻击。

papers.title: Magma: A Foundation Model for Multimodal AI Agents
papers.tldr_zh: Magma通过SoM与ToM标注机制，将视觉语言模型扩展为兼具数字界面导航与机器人操控能力的多模态智能体基础模型。

papers.title: Online Preference Alignment for Language Models via Count-based Exploration
papers.tldr_zh: 本文将基于计数的探索奖励融入直接偏好优化（DPO），提出一种理论上可证高效的在线RLHF对齐算法。

papers.title: A Survey of Mathematical Reasoning in the Era of Multimodal Large Language Model: Benchmark, Method & Challenges
papers.tldr_zh: 首篇系统综述多模态大语言模型数学推理领域，覆盖200余项研究，从基准、方法与挑战三维度剖析AGI进展。

papers.title: From Grounding to Manipulation: Case Studies of Foundation Model Integration in Embodied Robotic Systems
papers.tldr_zh: 本文系统比较三种基础模型集成范式（端到端VLA、VLM流水线、多模态LLM流水线）在机器人指令理解与操作任务中的性能权衡。

papers.title: DexTrack: Towards Generalizable Neural Tracking Control for Dexterous Manipulation from Human References
papers.tldr_zh: DexTrack 通过数据飞轮驱动的神经追踪控制器，使灵巧机器人手无需任务专属奖励即可跟随多样化人手-物体交互参考。

papers.title: LDexMM: Language-Guided Dexterous Multi-Task Manipulation with Reinforcement Learning
papers.tldr_zh: LDexMM将语言引导的分割与强化学习结合，使单个灵巧手模型可完成最多10项操作任务，3任务成功率达72.7%。
